title: Maintain drainage systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain drainage systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Inspect drainage systems

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to minimise risks to self and others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to minimise risks to self and others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to minimise risks to self and others.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Inspect drainage system visually for blockages, leaks and operating faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect drainage system visually for blockages, leaks and operating faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect drainage system visually for blockages, leaks and operating faults.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Inspect drainage systems

elements.title: Assist with system component maintenance

pcs.text: Inspect components for wear or blockage

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect components for wear or blockage.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Replace simple components as directed.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean silt from channels, drains, sumps and crossings.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe water flow through channels and from outlets to confirm it is unobstructed.
